--- Main Page ---
Chowrastha | Home
Irani Chai
Indians grow with tea, meet with tea, celebrate with tea and even share
sadness with tea. Chai was born on dusty roads in India.
Irani
chai
is a unique form of tea unlike any other version of Indian
chai, made by the combination of
mawa
(creamy sweetened milk) and
black tea
. The result is a sweet and creamy chai. Iran chai and
Osmania biscuit: The combination has been ruling the city for decades
and is patronized by students. Professionals and businessmen, not to
forget the daily wage workers, beggars and the elite sections all alike.
Dum Biryani
Historians believe that biryani
originated from Persia and was brought to India by the Mughals in the
early 1800's.
This delicacy of Hyderabad
is sought after all over
the world today.
Chicken Dum Biryani
is goodness of rice and meat
that comes in layers. The process of cooking in its own steam until rice
is fluffy and meat cooked just to perfection is called "Dum Cooking". A
lengthy cooking process but all totally worth the effort.
Evening Snacks
Indians and snacking are inseparable.
Most of the western
counties we see people having dinner around dusk but Indians snack.
Dinner is generally consumed between 8-10 PM.
Vegetable Pakora,
Mirchi Bajji, Chaats, Steamy Dosa's and Frankie's
to name a few.
Each of these dishes are from different parts of India, many times
twisted with local regional flavors - The end results make you crave for
more…
Craved Curries
With delicate flavors and varied spice level
, curries are the
base of Indian base home cooking. From North Indian dishes adapted as
world favorites like Butter Chicken, Malai Kofta to Southern Specialties
like Chili Chicken Fry, and Natu Kodi Pulusu, or Spicy Goat Curry
Customers can calm their mouthwatering cravings.
Cool Beverages and Desserts
An Indian meal does not end without a dessert. For people with a sweet
tooth and to soften your palate after a spicy meal, we have Indian
favorites from Mango/Chikoo Shake, traditional Lassi, Indian Pastries
and sweets.
About Chowrastha
USA - Land of immigrants with deep rooted cultures spanning across length and width of entire
World. Desi Chowrastha is here, to celebrate culture, heritage through food, much more than
nostalgia and recipes. In today's ever-growing competitive market, we are here with delicacies
that tantalize the taste buds, providing excellent customer service and value for money. As
Sam Walton
said,
“there is only one boss, the
customer”
. We think
Customers certify the success of recipe, the demand
and growth”.
Desi Chowrastha gives attention to the diversified food and culture of various cities in India.
With the touch of southern spices, we are trying to deliver
“scrumptious food that smack your lips”
catering to South
Asian, and local and international foodies.

Our Inspiration
With 29 states, 8 union territories, 22
official languages, 8 recognized religions - the diversity is not in just the people and
cultures but also the food. Every state has specific styles, spices, flavors and recipes of
food.
With Desi Chowrastha we are trying our part to bring the flavors of India
and provide vibrant environment to
Come Together and
Relish
Together.
Food Gallery
Interested in Our Franchise?
Want to own a “Chowrastha” and share the Indianness in your city. We are open to
franchise. Owning a restaurant has its own challenges. If you love to serve and want to enjoy
the rewards, we are here to help you kick start and support with our experience. Submit your
request to explore further.

About Chowrastha
Bring back the culture of
“Chowrastha” and Indianness through Food, Fresh Groceries, Halal Meat and Vibrant Environment.
Who do We Cater?
USA - Land of immigrants with deep rooted cultures spanning across length and width of
entire World. Desi Chowrastha is here, to celebrate culture, heritage through food, much
more than nostalgia and recipes. In today's ever-growing competitive market, we are here
with delicacies that tantalize the taste buds, providing excellent customer service and
value for money. As
Sam Walton
said,
“there is only one boss,
the customer”.
We think
“Customers certify the success of
recipe, the demand and growth”.
At “Desi Chowrastha” through Food, Fresh Groceries, Halal Meat and Vibrant Environment; our
customers will have:
Fun, Full &
Feel for
Life
The USA has the largest number of immigrants from all over the world. The Indian migrant
population has been exploring in the last 5-6 years. With market research, and proven
industry experience we are launching “Desi Chowrastha” with a vision to see “Chowrastha” in
every city of USA for people to come together and celebrate the taste of Indianness like in
India how “Chowrastha's” defined the culture and brought people together.
We are on a pursuit to create a one stop shop for groceries, halal meat and restaurant
concept that caters not only to the largest Indian population in US, but to everyone that is
open to explore to the food of complex flavors and spices; also understand years of
evolution and the prominent culture that is ingrained in the food.
Desi Chowrastha gives attention to the diversified food and culture of various cities in
India. With the touch of southern spices, we are trying to deliver “scrumptious food that
smack your lips” catering to South Asian, and local and international foodies.
Desi - Land, Country
Word used to describe the people, cultures, and products of
the Indian subcontinent and their diaspora. Desi traces its origin specifically to the
people from the countries of India, Pakistan, and Bangladesh.
Chowrastha - The Intersection of Four Streets
The word is used in causal way to communicate about the joint
to hang out with friends and how Indian culture evolved in every city around these so called
“Chowrastha's”
The logo is inspired by intersection of four streets. Orange color circle fuels appetite,
and amplifies sences showing connection to our food that invokes the taste buds.
Vision
Bring back the culture of “Chowrastha '' and Indianness
to the South Asian community with groceries, halal meat
